programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Penguin Egg: The penguin dads are standing together to keep warm while they incubate their eggs. Tiny Toot, Gato and Pixie crawl underneath a penguin dad to help incubate his egg.
The Hermit Crab: Tiny Toot and her friends help a sweet little hermit crab find a nice shell for it to wear.
Happy tries to get the friends to understand 'Quiet Time'
Tickle Crabs: When Dad brings a pair of tenacious tickle crabs home from the beach, nowhere in the house is safe! His only hope of escaping their tickles is with help from his true love.
The Breakup: Leia and Tobias have a big fight and break up their friendship. Now they are fighting to see who is Oswaldo's best and only friend.
Ozzys Oil: Leia and Tobias have a big fight and break up their friendship. Now they are fighting to see who is Oswaldo's best and only friend.
Daniel was expecting to have a special picnic at Katerina's house, but the day doesn't turn out quite as he had planned. Daniel learns how to adapt when his routine changes.
Helium's evening at the theatre, starring Gold and Silver, is nearly ruined by Oxygen's hiccups, unless the Atoms can come up with a quick cure.
Deed encourages a friend to say 'swing' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.
Glitch wants a picnic so he stops the rain in the Amazon rainforest, upsetting the local tree frogs.
Bryan the ferry can't shut his engine off, so he's speeding out of control around the lake. How will Mojo and Bo get aboard to take control and steer Bryan to safety?
The Quick Fix: Ollie has accidentally broken Titus's beautiful new music box! He's going to be so upset, unless she can fix it before he returns.
The Flute: Bradbury and Pigglywig are fighting over a flute.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Dexterity Gene: Did you know there's such a thing as a Dexterity Gene? Lex is sure the gene's more developed in him than in anyone else, though Plu isn't so sure he agrees.
The Carrot Badge: The Squirrels are admiring everything Duggee has grown in his vegetable garden, especially his crop of giant carrots, when they hear a noise
The Face Painting Badge: The Squirrels have their faces painted, which leads to cases of mistaken identity.
Sonia is fascinated about living in the lighthouse, and it leads her to remember how special her own home is. (SL)
Sonia and Hugo try to solve the mysery of what Granny's sheet is for and learn that things can have different purposes. (SL)
Excitable Joe discovers his inner calm delivering to a yoga studio. From stretching to breathing, he brings his trademark zany energy to all things zen. (SL)
The Penguin Egg: The penguin dads are standing together to keep warm while they incubate their eggs. Tiny Toot, Gato and Pixie crawl underneath a penguin dad to help incubate his egg.
The Hermit Crab: Tiny Toot and her friends help a sweet little hermit crab find a nice shell for it to wear.
Happy tries to get the friends to understand 'Quiet Time'
The Floor is Bananas: Helping Hand has built a banana-themed obstacle course. But when Phoebe becomes competitive, can she and her team make it over the finish line together?
Henry meets a friendly Birthday Cake. He is getting ready to be collected from the bakers when they realise he isn't going to be big enough for all the people at the party.
Big Wheel: Seamus has found the old Ferris Wheel and would like Stanley to help him rebuild it for the whole town to enjoy.
Portrait: Stanley poses for a portrait for the town art class, but he still has other jobs to do. How will he ever stay still long enough so everyone can finish their artwork?
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
An Sraoth Mór: Tar éis turas go Pláinéad an Oighir, buaileann slaghdán Bubby, ach bíonn sé chomh buartha sin faoi go dtéann cúrsaí in olcais.
Cluiche Bleachtaireachta: Nuair a itheann duine éigin dinnéar an chriú agus críochnaíonn siad a gcluiche bleachtaireachta, caithfidh Adam agus an criú an mhistéir a réiteach!
Brewster is frightened when he hears thunder.
Helvetica notices that both the sun and moon are in the sky at the same time.
Téann Peppa agus an chlann ag sciáil ar Snowy Mountain. Feiceann siad go leor dá gcairde ann ar nós Mandy Mouse lena clár sciála.
Tá cóisir bhreithlae á heagrú ag Peppa dá peata, Goldie an t-iasc órga. Faoin bhfarraige téama na cóisire.
Oisín and Síofra go on an adventure to find out who owns the clothes they found all over the place.
Pre-school series featuring Mia the Tapir, who loves to make up little dances and perform them for all to see.
Pre-school fun, featuring Max the Zebra, who loves adventure.
Simon's sandwich has been stolen, who is the culprit?
His Own Medicine: As Nemi flew, he heard Huey's voice calling for help. However, when he approached the figure that seemed to be Huey and spoke, it crumbled into pieces.
A journey back in time to see how dinosaurs lived, utilising the latest digital CGI and green-screen technology. Presented by Andy Day.

Séimh: Téann MeMo agus BaBa sa tóir ar fhéileacán. Tá MeMo séimh leis nuair a leaindeálann sé ar a láimh.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Cow: A cow is lazily chewing its cud on a field. Tiny Toot pets its muzzle, which is soft and warm. The cow's drinking trough is empty, so Pixie finds a garden hose and fills it up.
The Balloon Frog: Tiny Toot, Pixie and Gato are at the little ballon frog's birthday party. The frogs suck in air and float up and down like party balloons.
Happy does NOT want to be IT.
Escape: When Mum and Dad describe a made-up world where they can relax without the girls, Bluey and Bingo decide to burst into their fantasy and chase them down.
Coconut Wars: Vivian learns that there's a coconut war going on at the gym to see who is gonna rule the school court. But Vivian wasn't invited because she always wins on everything.
Old Men Gang: Oswaldo and Mitchell have an argument and set up a fight for the next day. Oswaldo is afraid of being humiliated by his friends and asks a Gang of Seniors to train him.
Daniel and his friends are excited to go on a field trip to the library, but they arrive to find that it's closed. Together, they learn that sometimes plans may change.
Oxygen offers to teach Gold and Silver how to ride their new bike. But they are not ideal students and are unwilling to work in tandem.
Deed encourages a friend to say 'egg' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure!.
The Go Jetters are relaxing by the Dead Sea when Grandmaster Glitch causes a custard catastrophe - to the Vroomster.
Fabio's yummy new sauce is so sticky that he gets stuck to Mojo's bonnet. They have to do everything together until Bo figures out how to 'unsticky' that sauce!
A Juice Bar of My Own: When Bella opens a tea room to compete with Deedee's Juice Bar, everyone in Attic Town launches their own tiny hangout: the Woodleys' Milk Spot.
My Sweet Cuddlyboo: GreenBeard loses his teddy bear, and soon discovers that young Bradbury has taken it!

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: We are the Champions: The Fur Taxi drivers are going to an event on an intergalactic scale: the finals of the Universal Racing super cup!
The Transport Badge: Duggee's pal Rhodri leaves behind his hat. The Squirrels take a grand journey to return it.
The Talent Badge: It's time for King Tiger's Roar Talent Show, and the Squirrels are ready to compete.
When the strings of their ukelele break, Hugo and Sonia discover there are other ways to keep playing music. (SL)
When Sonia can't decide what to eat, she comes up with a new way to choose. (SL)
Eimear and her friends are practicing a dance for their flash dance mob in a secret location, but need Joe's deliveries for the performance. (SL)

Henry meets the Moon. He learns all about space, astronauts and even that the Moon loves cheese and crackers.
Sleepover: Stanley and a Can-Bot are helping Hettie host a museum sleepover for the kids.
Mayor Stan: Myrtle has a conference, so Stanley becomes Mayor for the day. Sophie and Benjamin are at hand to help!

Ionsaí na Nom Nom: Freagraíonn Adam agus an criú glao éigeandála ó Ghrabhróg, ceannaire na Nom Nom.
Tapaigh an Deisiú: Nuair a aimsíonn criú róbat darb ainm Nib astaróideach glan, cuireann a iarrachtaí 'feabhsúcháin' isteach ar gach rud - go dtí go n-aimsíonn siad an baile foirfe dó.
When Helvetica Frog gets the hiccups she wonders 'What causes hiccups?'
Carrick is drinking his favourite juice. The friends wonder, 'What do fish like to drink?'
Tá Peppa agus a cairde sa bpáirc spraoi. Déanann Mr Bull Clubtheach do Peppa agus a cairde. Is clubtheach álainn é le sleamhnán ar an taobh.
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag spraoi ina gClubtheach. Bunaíonn siad club bleachtairí. Bíonn sé ina mhistéir cheart nuair a chailleann Daddy Pig a chuid eochracha.
